name: Watch Your Eggs Survival VR Demo

reviews.review_description:
I'm really impressed by this game, it shows great promise! The animations and characters are beautiful, kudos to the artist for their work. The gameplay is also very smooth and enjoyable.

 Even though the game is still in development, I have a few suggestions for improvement. First, I find that there are a bit too many enemies appearing simultaneously, which can make the experience a bit frustrating. Second, the game environment seems a bit small to me. Expanding the play areas would give players more freedom and allow them to explore the environments more.

 Finally, I think adding a multiplayer mode could attract even more players and increase the game's lifespan.

 In conclusion, I'm convinced that this game has the potential to become a great success. I'm looking forward to it and I'll be the first to buy the final version!

Game starts slowly but the intensity picks up fast and you have to be very aware of your surrounding. Auto-shooting weapons help to eliminate some of the enemies for you. My favorite was “bananov” a burning banana launcher which creates a fire wall:) reminds me some of the crazy attacks in Worms game:)

I want more different guns and more penguins who can help fight the baddies

A fun and charming arcade shooter with a cute art style, and a colourful world that even has boss battles. I like that the eggs you unlock become your companions for battle. Would be interesting to see a dual wielding mechanic in the future. Give this game a try!
